# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
consumers:
  - username: "service-account"
    custom_id: "service-account-id"
    plugins:
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          limit: 1000
          window_size: [60, 3600, 86400]
          policy: "local"
          sync_rate: -1
          identifier: "consumer"
          fault_tolerant: true
      - name: "key-auth"
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_names: ["apikey"]
          anonymous: ""
          run_on_preflight: true
upstreams:
  - name: "user-service"
    host_header: "user-service"
    algorithm: "round_robin"
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        https_verify_certificate: true
        timeout: 10
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/health"
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 302]
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 404, 500, 501, 502, 503, 504]
          timeouts: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          successes: 0
    targets:
      - target: "user-service:8080"
        weight: 100
      - target: "user-service-2:8080"
        weight: 100
  - name: "order-service"
    host_header: "order-service"
    algorithm: "round_robin"
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        https_verify_certificate: true
        timeout: 10
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/health"
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 302]
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 404, 500, 501, 502, 503, 504]
          timeouts: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          successes: 0
    targets:
      - target: "order-service:8080"
        weight: 100
      - target: "order-service-2:8080"
        weight: 100
  - name: "payment-service"
    host_header: "payment-service"
    algorithm: "round_robin"
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        https_verify_certificate: true
        timeout: 10
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/health"
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 302]
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 404, 500, 501, 502, 503, 504]
          timeouts: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          successes: 0
    targets:
      - target: "payment-service:8080"
        weight: 100
      - target: "payment-service-2:8080"
        weight: 100
routes:
  - name: "user-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/users"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstreams:
      - name: "user-service"
        weight: 100
    plugins:
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins: ["*"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Content-Length", "Content-MD5", "Content-Type", "Date", "X-Api-Key", "X-Request-ID"]
          exposed_headers: ["*"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: true
          realm: "API Gateway"
          key: "user-service-jwt-key"
          anonymous: ""
          run_on_preflight: true
  - name: "order-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/orders"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstreams:
      - name: "order-service"
        weight: 100
    plugins:
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins: ["*"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Content-Length", "Content-MD5", "Content-Type", "Date", "X-Api-Key", "X-Request-ID"]
          exposed_headers: ["*"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: true
          realm: "API Gateway"
          key: "order-service-jwt-key"
          anonymous: ""
          run_on_preflight: true
  - name: "payment-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/payments"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "PUT"
      - "DELETE"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstreams:
      - name: "payment-service"
        weight: 100
    plugins:
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins: ["*"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Content-Length", "Content-MD5", "Content-Type", "Date", "X-Api-Key", "X-Request-ID"]
          exposed_headers: ["*"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_name: "user_id"
          secret_is_base64: true
          realm: "API Gateway"
          key: "payment-service-jwt-key"
          anonymous: ""
          run_on_preflight: true
plugins:
  - name: "request-transformer"
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Request-ID"
      remove:
        headers:
          - "X-Powered-By"
  - name: "response-transformer"
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-API-Version: 1.0"
          - "X-Response-Time"
  - name: "http-log"
    config:
      http_endpoint: "http://logging-service:8080/log"
      method: "POST"
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
  - name: "statsd"
    config:
      host: "statsd-service"
      port: 8125
      prefix: "kong"
      sample_rate: 1
      flush_interval: 10
      connect_timeout: 1000
